/CAL:TO SET DA MTR/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION, FINES & FEES OWED IN THIS CASE MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN 13023871,/CTORD:PROBATION IN #12002689 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/
